title: Blueberry Cheesecake Baked Oatmeal Recipe - Tablespoon.com
ingredients:
4


cups old-fashioned oats                    

1


cup packed brown sugar                    

1 1/2


teaspoons baking powder                    

3/4


teaspoon salt                    

4


cups milk                    

3


eggs                    

3


tablespoons butter, melted                    

2


teaspoons vanilla                    

1


cup Cascadian Farm™ frozen organic blueberries                    

1


package (8 oz) cream cheese, softened                    

1/3


cup granulated sugar                    

1/2


cup blueberry preserves
